fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases now match exactly in vertices, faces, and four-decimal bounds: authored 11,971 / 11,199, NODE DOJO 13,242 / 12,432, peak height 11,971 / 11,199, line thickness 9,591 / 8,855, and subdivide 12 at 3,971 / 3,548. The guide follows Blender 5.1's float32 Poly tangent calculation, minimum-twist normal transport, full-precision tilt, independent normal resampling, and left-associated quaternion multiplication. All 56 aligned guide-quaternion components are bit-exact. Re-extracting the supplied Pixels Medium TTF without seven-decimal atlas rounding makes all 792 centered-glyph and realized proximity-target coordinate components bit-exact while retaining the established touching-cell contour topology.
